abilities.name: Encouragement
abilities.description: Friendly within 6 yards may suffer 1 damage when performing Action to gain + to flip.

abilities.name: Gremlin Boss
abilities.description: Accompanied by friendly Bayou Gremlins equal to Rank Value.

abilities.name: Delegate (Tome)
abilities.description: After attack succeeds, instead affects friendly character within 3 yards.

actions: (1) Shotgun | AV varies | Rg: z12 | Various effects with Shotgun triggers
(1) Melee | AV varies | Rg: y1-2 | Various close combat effects
system.notes: Prolific successful Gremlins who never stop growing. Largest of their kind. Bully smaller Gremlins into subservience. Gremlin society revolves around Bayou Bosses. Determine village politics and feuds.
